subcodes.first_line: O youth! God grant that, through the bounty of the Most Merciful, thou mightest attain to His limitless outpourings. Since thou hast been adorned
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای جوان انشاء الله بعنایت رحمن بفیوضات نامتناهیه الهیه فائز شوی چون در اول
subcodes.subjects: @exhortations and counsels, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
